id.description: Unique identifier for this provider instance.

description.description: Human-readable description of this provider instance.

region.description: AWS region for KMS. Supports ${ENV_VAR} placeholders.

accessKeyId.description: AWS access key ID. Optional — uses SDK credential chain if not provided. Supports ${ENV_VAR} placeholders.

secretAccessKey.description: AWS secret access key. Optional — uses SDK credential chain if not provided. Supports ${ENV_VAR} placeholders.
